name: Create Project API
summary: Backend API endpoint for creating a new project with validation and persistence
goals: Persist new project records with validated metadata
Return the created project with generated ID and timestamps

specDetail.description: Exposes POST /api/projects endpoint that creates a new project. Validates name uniqueness, path validity, and persists the project record.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File system path for the project (required, valid path)

constraints: Must return 409 Conflict if project name already exists
Must return 400 Bad Request for invalid paths or missing required fields
Must create the project directory on disk if it does not exist

acceptanceCriteria.given: a valid project creation request with unique name and valid path
acceptanceCriteria.then: a new project is created and returned with status 201 and the full project object

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
